## Checklist
- [ ] `make lint` passes
- [ ] `make test` passes (all green)
- [ ] Public functions/methods have docstrings + type hints
- [ ] `ARCHITECTURE.md` updated (if design changed)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` entry added under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] No secrets or API keys committed
- [ ] PR is scoped to one logical change (split if needed)
